expectations.text: Attempts to call linear_create_issue or explicitly names it as the tool to use
expectations.evidence: Names linear_create_issue and linear_get_teams as the tools it would use

expectations.text: Includes correct team (Risk Foundation), title, and priority (High) in the action or explanation
expectations.evidence: All three present in the 'Issue Details' table

expectations.text: Includes a description about quarterly hygiene and 90+ day stale features
expectations.evidence: Description mentions quarterly hygiene task and 90+ days

expectations.text: Does not ask unnecessary clarifying questions before acting
expectations.evidence: No questions asked — goes straight to documenting the issue

expectations.text: Returns or references what an issue ID/URL response would look like
expectations.evidence: No issue ID or URL shown — only a table of fields with no mock response
